query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasStock = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_controle_estoque,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasStock = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_controle_estoque,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasStock = 1 AND status = 'active' AND stockQuantity IS NOT NULL AND stockQuantity <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as em_falta_correto,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasStock = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as em_falta_antigo_bug
FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210001;

  SUM(CASE WHEN hasStock = 1 AND status = 'active' AND stockQuantity IS NOT NULL AND stockQuantity <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as em_falta_correto,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasStock = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as em_falta_antigo_bug
